sourceMovie.title: Regretting You
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Regretting You (2025) stuck because it commits to its romance premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Josh Boone's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The romance and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Regretting You clicked for you, Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind (2004) is a strong next stop: both trade in romance and drama, with emotional whiplash that feels honest. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Regretting You?
faq.answer: Try Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind, After, After We Collided—each shares DNA with Regretting You while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Regretting You?
faq.answer: Regretting You (2025) is best described as Romance, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Regretting You worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this romance lane.
